reviews.comment:
Excelente atención en playa por parte de los chicos, extremadamente atentos en el servicio y muy cordiales. Los Baños muy limpios y la atención en el Full de diez. Tome un café insuperable. Sumamente recomendable. Volveré a ir...!!!!!

Sigan así que van a tener muchos éxitos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service on the beach from the staff; they were extremely attentive and very friendly. The restrooms were spotless, and the service at the Full was top-notch. I had an amazing coffee. Highly recommended. I'll definitely be back!

Keep it up, and you'll have a lot of success!

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias. Los esperamos nuevamente para intercambiar opiniones y experiencias que ayudan a un mejor servicio.

reviews.comment:
Está ubicado frente al hospital civil Fernando Irastorza. Excelente atención de los playeros.
Cuenta con un salón de ventas donde podés comprar algo fresco o tomarte un café. Los baños muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
It's located across from the Fernando Irastorza Civil Hospital. Excellent service from the staff.
It has a snack bar where you can buy something fresh or have a coffee. The restrooms are very clean.
